channel.title: Experimental Validation on Foldable Robotics
channel.description: Recent content in Experimental Validation on Foldable Robotics

item.title: Actuator Fitting
item.description:
Introduction

The purpose of this assignment is to develop a model for your actuator.

Steps

item.title: System Capture and Fitting
item.description:
Introduction

The purpose of this assignment is to collect data on your system for use in fitting your model

Course Resources

  • Optimization Module
  • Experimental Validation Module
  • Dynamics Module

Instructions
